metadata.description: Interview-driven HTML planning reports. One conversation, one self-contained .html file. Four themes, inline comment system, Big Copy export. Zero dependencies.

plugins.name: tps-report
plugins.description: Generate a self-contained HTML planning report: Dark, Hacker CRT, Olde Tyme, Chalk Flower themes. Inline comments persist in localStorage. Expandable sections. Big Copy exports the full plan + annotations as plain text.
